# Pre-Study AI Workflow Questionnaire

> Part of PRAXIS Universal Kit v0.2
> Completed BEFORE observation begins. ~10 minutes.
> All data anonymized. Participant can withdraw at any time.

---

## Participant ID (generated by kit)
[Auto-filled]

## Section 1: AI Tool Usage

**1. Which AI tools do you currently use in your work?** (Select all that apply)
- [ ] ChatGPT
- [ ] Claude / Anthropic
- [ ] GitHub Copilot
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Windsurf / Codeium
- [ ] Aider
- [ ] Google Gemini
- [ ] Other: __________

**2. How often do you use AI tools for work tasks?**
- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Several times per week
- [ ] Several times per month
- [ ] Rarely

**3. What types of tasks do you use AI for?** (Select all that apply)
- [ ] Writing code
- [ ] Debugging / fixing code
- [ ] Writing content (articles, documentation)
- [ ] Research / information gathering
- [ ] Data analysis
- [ ] Planning / brainstorming
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other: __________

**4. On average, how many AI-assisted tasks do you complete per work session?**
- [ ] 1-3
- [ ] 4-7
- [ ] 8-15
- [ ] 15+

## Section 2: Current Workflow

**5. Do you follow a structured process when using AI tools?**
- [ ] Yes, I have a defined workflow
- [ ] Somewhat — I have habits but nothing formal
- [ ] No, I use AI ad-hoc

**6. How do you typically validate AI outputs?**
- [ ] I review every output carefully before using it
- [ ] I review most outputs but sometimes accept quickly
- [ ] I rely on the AI being mostly correct
- [ ] I don't usually validate

**7. How often do AI outputs need corrections?**
- [ ] Almost always (>80% of the time)
- [ ] Often (50-80%)
- [ ] Sometimes (20-50%)
- [ ] Rarely (<20%)
- [ ] Almost never

**8. When AI makes a mistake, what typically happens?**
- [ ] I notice immediately and fix it
- [ ] I notice after some time and go back
- [ ] Someone else catches it later
- [ ] Mistakes sometimes go undetected

## Section 3: Governance Awareness

**9. Do you have any rules or guidelines for how you use AI?** (e.g., "always verify citations," "never paste sensitive data")
- [ ] Yes, I have explicit rules (describe briefly): __________
- [ ] I have informal habits but nothing written down
- [ ] No, I just use AI freely

**10. Have you ever experienced any of the following when using AI?** (Select all that apply)
- [ ] AI gave confident but wrong answers
- [ ] AI agreed with me when I was wrong
- [ ] AI forgot context from earlier in the conversation
- [ ] AI produced outputs that looked correct but weren't
- [ ] AI's tone or personality affected how much I trusted it
- [ ] None of the above
